name: Obsbot Webcam Tripod
description: Lightweight, yet able to support a surprising amount of weight, the OBSBOT Tiny Webcam Tripod is an ideal travel-sized tripod for setting up your OBSBOT Tiny 4K AI-Powered PTZ 4K Webcam.

features.Key Features:: For Tiny 4K AI-Powered PTZ 4K Webcam | 1/4"-20 Mounting Screw | 3.14" Tall when Open
